Artwork for 1 different sign design

Arrangement of supplied logos and information, including:
  • Proofing of all items in this quote

Artwork to be supplied in print ready High Resolution EPS or PDF format. If specific colours are required, these are to be provided as PMS or Pantone: or additional matching fees will be incurred.

Quote is based on all items selected at one time. 

Price is based on works being completed during normal working hours.

Engineering not included - if applicable. 
Council approvals not included - if applicable.
Landlord approvals not included - if applicable

Fire-rated/non combustible ACM is not included in this quote (if applicable). It is the customer's responsibility to specify that Fire rated ACM is legally required for this building. Signarama Springwood takes no responsibility of any signage installed which is not fire rated if the customer did not specifically request that this be quoted for. No warranty or replacement will apply relating to the use of non-fire rated ACM where this was not specifically included in the quote.

Sailtrack Banners are not fire rated or non-combustible
Wall Graphics - painted walls must have non-teflon based paint finish. Allow a minimum of 5 days after painting before wall graphics can be installed.

SIGN REMOVAL - We recommend replacing signs with slightly larger ones to cover any damage caused by sign removal. While every care will be taken, we bear no responsibility for any damage caused by sign removal as these may be glued as well as screwed which makes damage unavoidable. Sign shadows are likely after sign removal when a sign is not replaced. This is due to paint fade around the sign.

*Lightboxes: Where only lightbox face is replaced, no responsibility is taken for the condition of lightbox internals i.e. internal lighting. Customer should ensure these are in good condition. 

COUNCIL APPROVALS AND FEES

It is the customer's responsibility to apply for signage approvals from their Local Council - if this is required. In accepting our quote - the customer takes FULL responsibility for Council approvals. Signarama Springwood bears no responsibility.

Annual signage permits and fees may also apply. These are the sole responsibility of the customer. Signarama Springwood bears no responsibility for these and costs are not included in the quote.

LANDLORD APPROVALS

It is the customer's sole responsibility to obtain approvals for any works from the Landlord, where applicable. We will supply relevant documentation as required (additional fees apply for SWMS and inductions) - additional fees will apply.

FENCE MESH

Fence mesh is a short term product and cannot be UV stabilised. We do not warranty eyelets or zip ties as these are affected by weather and wind. Any replacements will be at the customer's cost.
